name: Banana Granola Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in the manufacturer's instructions.
2. Mix all dry ingredients (flour, milk, salt, yeast) in a large bowl until well combined.
3. In another bowl, combine water, melted butter, mashed bananas, and molasses.
4. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just combined.
5. Fold in granola, walnuts, and dried banana chips.
6. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan and place in preheated oven.
7. Follow remaining manufacturer's instructions for baking time and temperature.
8. Allow bread to cool completely before turning off the oven.
